title: astragalus mollissimus
intro: Astragalus mollissimus, also known as the woolly milkvetch, is a perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, belonging to the pea family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus mollissimus include boosting the immune system, reducing stress, and improving cardiovascular health, making it a popular herb in traditional Chinese medicine. Astragalus mollissimus can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as capsules, teas, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and longevity.
